hooks.command: jq -r '"Permission needed: " + (.tool_name // "unknown")' | xargs -I{} notify-send -u critical 'Claude Code' '{}' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-attention.oga 2>/dev/null || true
notify-send -u critical 'Claude Code' 'Session finished' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga 2>/dev/null || true
